steps.title: Locate the relevant row in the table
steps.content: The question asks which group of participants viewed onetime passcodes as most secure. The row for onetime passcodes shows the percentage of participants in each country choosing that method.

steps.title: Identify the highest percentage
steps.content:
According to the table, the highest percentage for onetime passcodes belongs to Japan, so the sentence is best completed by naming participants in Japan.

Choice A (UK) and choice B (India) report lower percentages for that method, and an incorrect response duplicates B.

The answer is C.
